text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Strolling down the street one weekend, I happen to spot Mejiro
McQueen, who appears to be in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm hm hmm! ♪ Don't stop! Go for victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I've been waiting all week for this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Better enter the karaoke place before someone spots—
choice_data_list: Going to do some karaoke?
Going to do some karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Th-that's right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That is to say... I was thinking of going to practice my winning concert
songs.
choice_data_list: In that case, do you want to go together?
In that case, do you want to go together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eh? You wish to come along too?
choice_data_list:
You said it was for the winning concerts, right?
I'll help out.

You said it was for the winning concerts, right?
I'll help out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-well... Thank you. Let's be on our way, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something feels rather off about McQueen, but I follow her into the
karaoke place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whew. Let's pause it there for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What did you think about my singing? Did you identify any points for
improvement?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's sung through quite the assortment of songs, but she doesn't
seem to be enjoying it much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just where did that good mood disappear off to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: Am I a bother by being here?
Am I a bother by being here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What makes you say that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That's not the case at all. But how can I say this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I should just be honest here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I didn't come to karaoke today to practice Winning
Concert songs. Actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wanted to sing some fight songs.
choice_data_list: Fight songs?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, like the ones you hear fans sing at sporting events to support
their team. They're called fight songs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I happen to attend sporting events myself sometimes... Once in a blue
moon, really.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I occasionally like to sing fight songs at karaoke on my days off as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That's the real reason why I came here today...
choice_data_list: Why not belt some out, then?
Why not belt some out, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I shall do nothing of the sort! I can't have you seeing me act in such
a juvenile fashion!
choice_data_list: What if I joined you?
What if I joined you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uh... Y-you want to join in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now w-wait just a moment. I can go without doing it today, okay?
choice_data_list: Nah, let's sing together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But again, I don't want you to see how I get...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait, you've already entered a song?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: BRING 'EM HOME, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: BRING 'EM HOME, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Any sense of shame that McQueen had felt earlier is driven off by the
fiery chants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We shout just as if we were in the stands at a ballpark.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, that was a bit embarrassing. Though, admittedly, it was
also quite fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: If I could, I'd go watch a game right this instant.
choice_data_list: How did you come to like watching sports?
How did you come to like watching sports?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: If I had to say... I suppose I love the atmosphere at the venue.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the Mejiro family, I've always felt it important to
maintain my composure at all times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So when I went to my first sports stadium, I was quite taken aback. It
all just seemed so lively.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The fact that there could be a place where no one would judge you
for shouting and flouncing about...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I found the experience to be very fresh and inviting.
choice_data_list: So you ended up finding a new kind of fun?
So you ended up finding a new kind of fun?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, you could say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In any case, what do you say to getting back to singing? I'm still
rather fired up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that we've left, I can't help but feel embarrassed after all. I
hope the other patrons weren't able to hear me.
choice_data_list: You were having so much fun though!
You were having so much fun though!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well yes, that is true. It has been a long while since I was able to let
loose to such an extent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Though you must promise me this, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Not a word about this will get out to the other students or staff. And if possible, I would like you to completely forget about it too...
